overall.description: First-person underwater exploration gameplay from Subnautica, featuring a diver navigating deep dark waters with bioluminescent flora and a large thermal vent structure. The player swims through an alien ocean environment with glowing spherical plants and purple coral reefs.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep ocean abyss with scattered bioluminescent flora

events.description: steam and bubbles become visible in the distance, indicating a thermal vent ahead

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through dark water while holding a propulsion tool, approaching glowing spherical plants

entered.detail: large spherical plant structure with glowing blue lattice pattern and branching internal structure
white steam and bubble particles rising from the seabed in the distance
dark jagged rock formations on the ocean floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the deep dark ocean with limited visibility. The player swims toward a glowing blue spherical bioluminescent plant while holding a propulsion tool. As the player advances, steam and bubbles become visible in the distance, signaling a thermal vent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: thermal vent area with smoking geyser structure

events.description: large thermal vent structure comes into full view, dominating the center of the frame
player begins circling around the thermal vent, examining it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around a massive smoking thermal vent structure while examining its rocky surface and emissions

entered.detail: tall rocky structure with porous brown and red surface emitting thick smoke and steam from the top
clusters of red and orange aquatic plants growing on the rocks

segments.scene_description: The player discovers a massive thermal vent geyser emitting smoke and steam. The camera circles around the structure, revealing its textured rocky surface with red and orange patches. The environment shifts from open water to a more enclosed area around the vent, with bioluminescent plants now visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: purple coral reef forest with dense vegetation

events.description: leaving the thermal vent area and entering a dense purple coral reef zone
small schools of tiny fish become visible swimming around the coral formations

agents.ego_description: swimming downward and forward through dense purple coral formations, examining the seabed vegetation

entered.detail: dense purple and pink coral formations covering the seabed with branching structures
tall red grass-like aquatic plants swaying in the current
tiny white and silver fish swimming in scattered groups around the coral

segments.scene_description: Departing the thermal vent, the player enters a dense purple coral reef area. The seabed is covered in vibrant purple and pink coral formations with patches of red seaweed. Small schools of fish swim around the vegetation as the player navigates through the underwater forest, with glowing spherical plants visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coral reef plateau with scattered bioluminescent flora

events.description: player ascends slightly while continuing forward, moving over the coral reef

agents.ego_description: swimming over the coral reef toward distant bioluminescent plants, with occasional particle clouds passing by

entered.detail: white floating organic particles and marine snow drifting through the water column

segments.scene_description: The player swims over the purple coral reef toward open water, with the dense coral formations now passing to the left. Multiple bioluminescent sphere trees become visible in the distance, scattered across the dark ocean. White particle clouds drift through the water as the player continues exploring the deep underwater landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey from the oppressive darkness of the deep ocean into a vibrant, bioluminescent coral landscape. It begins with the camera gliding toward a glowing blue spherical plant, as distant steam and bubbles signal the approach of a thermal vent. As the player reaches the massive geyser, the scene shifts to a close-up exploration of the structure's textured red and orange rocky surface before moving away from the smoke. The camera then drifts into a dense forest of vibrant purple and pink coral reefs teeming with small fish, navigating through the colorful vegetation. Finally, the view opens up as the coral recedes to the left, revealing a vast dark expanse dotted with scattered bioluminescent sphere trees and drifting white particle clouds.
